description_long: This is a cylindrical, upright fire extinguisher with a weathered red metal body, showing signs of use and age. The top features a black metal handle and lever mechanism, with a short black hose attached near the nozzle, looping down the side. Prominently displayed on the front is a large, multi-colored instructional label with text and pictograms, while additional white text in another language is visible on the side. The base is slightly wider and shows some scuffing and wear, consistent with frequent handling or placement on rough surfaces. The overall construction appears robust, with all functional parts such as the handle, lever, and hose clearly defined. The extinguisher is designed for easy portability and quick deployment in emergency situations.
description: A weathered red metal fire extinguisher with a black handle, lever, and hose, featuring a large instructional label and side text.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the black carrying handle and the hose running vertically down the back.
description_view_1: Front-left view highlighting the instructional label, nozzle, and the hose attached near the top.
description_view_2: Rear-right view displaying white vertical text on the side and partial view of the label.
description_view_3: Left side view showing the nozzle, handle, and the hose curving down the side, with white text visible.
attribute_label_or_signage: Large rectangular multi-colored instructional label on the front, with additional white vertical text on the side; label contains text, pictograms, and colored sections.
attribute_hose_or_nozzle: Short black hose attached near the top, curving down the side, with a metal nozzle at the end; hose is unsecured and hangs freely.
